features.title: Initialize git baseline for session handoff

verification.evidence: git status succeeds at project root and an initial bootstrap commit exists

features.notes: Current project root is not a git repository.

features.title: Restore Unity licensing for batchmode verification

verification.evidence: Unity batchmode exits without licensing IPC timeout and writes an import or quit log

features.notes: Current smoke attempt exits with code 199 after Licensing Client IPC timeout.

verification.evidence: dry run enumerates participants, trials, and avatars without path errors

features.title: Assemble 6D RDW-aware per-frame feature vectors

verification.evidence: sample sequences contain vx, vy, g_r, g_c, g_t, reset_flag with documented shape and units

features.notes: Feature definitions come from the plan and StatisticsLogger outputs.

features.title: Add segmentation, normalization, and split generation

verification.evidence: serialized train/val/test tensors are written with stored normalization stats and split metadata

features.notes: Use subject-level splits and reject windows with large sampling gaps.

features.title: Adapt SingularTrajectory input layers to 6D RDW vectors

verification.evidence: model builds, loads checkpoints with strict=False, and finishes a smoke forward pass

features.notes: Optional auxiliary heads can be deferred to a follow-up feature if needed.

features.title: Adapt PECNet encoder path to flattened RDW-aware histories

verification.evidence: preprocessed inputs are standardized and a smoke batch runs end-to-end

features.notes: Track any reset-weighted loss as a separate optional refinement.

features.title: Adapt AgentFormer projector and checkpoint loading for RDW features

verification.evidence: new input projector runs with strict=False checkpoint restore and a smoke train step

features.notes: Freeze-first-block stabilization can be included in the same feature if low risk.

features.title: Implement ADE/FDE plus reset-focused evaluation slices

verification.evidence: evaluation output includes overall ADE/FDE and reset-flag subset metrics

features.notes: Gain-threshold slices can be added if data coverage is sufficient.

features.title: Run baseline, naive fine-tune, and RDW-aware fine-tune for SingularTrajectory

verification.evidence: metrics logged for all three conditions on the agreed test split

features.notes: Keep config and split identifiers with the outputs.

features.title: Run baseline, naive fine-tune, and RDW-aware fine-tune for PECNet

verification.evidence: metrics logged for all three conditions on the agreed test split

features.notes: Store normalization stats alongside each run.

features.title: Run baseline, naive fine-tune, and RDW-aware fine-tune for AgentFormer

verification.evidence: metrics logged for all three conditions on the agreed test split

features.notes: Record any frozen-block warm-up settings in the run config.
